sys_script_fix.description:
When a task starts a template, the template started should be stored on the task. This was not implemented in the initial release of 2.5 and this fix is to correct the data that should have been there.
How to validate the Fix Script How to test the fix script.
1. Run this query... https://ven02975.service-now.com/x_153465_discovert_discover_routing_runtime_list.do?sysparm_query=parent_taskISNOTEMPTY This represents all of the templates run from a task in this environment.
Log the count.
2. Run this query.... https://ven02975.service-now.com/x_153465_discovert_discover_routing_runtime_list.do?sysparm_query=parent_taskISNOTEMPTY This represents all of the templates run from a task in this environment where the child_route_template was properly set. Based on what I see in the code, this should only happen if the fix script was not run last time around. So, please notify me if you see counts' greater than 0.
Log the count.
3. Run the fix Script
4. Run the second query again. https://ven02975.service-now.com/x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance_list.do?sysparm_query=child_route_templateISNOTEMPTY
The count of the first query (step 1) and the second query (Step 2 and Step 4) should match. If the counts don't match, it is possible the same task ran multiple child templates. We do not log this in the task. So, Group by Parent Task. Count the number of groups with more than one item. This should be the difference in your count.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker_2_5_13_Set_child_route_template
